# Stash AI

> Human-Centric AI Innovation

Stash AI is a venture lab building the next generation of human-centric tools. We combine the world's most powerful AI models into our proprietary "Model Stack" to create products that make life easier, smarter, and fairer.

## Products

- **The JEEnius Suite:** An advanced AI-powered educational platform for JEE and NEET preparation. It uses specialized agents fine-tuned on over 25 years of past exam papers to provide personalized, step-by-step tutoring without hallucinations.
  - JEE JEEnius: For engineering aspirants (JEE Mains/Advanced).
  - NEET JEEnius: For medical aspirants (NEET).

## Future Labs

- **Project Vital (Healthcare):** AI that simplifies medical reports for patients.
- **Project Civic (Legal):** Democratizing access to justice by making legal documents readable.
- **Project Green (Climate):** Hyper-local climate insights for sustainability.

## Services & B2B

- **Custom AI Solutions:** We partner with enterprises to build custom AI solutions, deploy specialized Model Stacks, and fine-tune Large Language Models (LLMs) for bespoke business applications.

## Contact

- Email: stash.ai.tech@gmail.com
